meta_title: For Founders: debugging with AI to Solve can't finish projects (Intermediate Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome can't finish projects. A Intermediate-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Debugging with AI to Ship Faster (Idea List)
content.seo_description: Stop stalling your SaaS. Learn to use AI debugging with Antigravity and Claude Code to finish your projects, ship faster, and start generating revenue today.
content.answer_block: The 'can't finish' syndrome is a technical debt and cognitive load issue. By offloading deep-stack debugging to Claude Code and utilizing Antigravity for architectural oversight, you decouple the creative building process from the friction of syntax errors. This transition allows you to focus on product-market fit rather than terminal logs.
content.intro:
You have a graveyard of half-finished repositories, each one started with the fire of a billion-dollar vision and left to rot in the cold silence of a 'TODO' comment. The bottleneck isn't your talent; it's the friction of the machine. Every hour spent chasing a stack trace is an hour lost on revenue-generating features. 

True founders don't debug line-by-line; they orchestrate systems. By leveraging AI-native debugging workflows, you can dissolve the technical barriers that keep your MVP in limbo. It is time to stop being a coder and start being a builder.

steps.title: Architectural Health Check
steps.description: Before debugging, analyze the structural integrity of your codebase to identify bottlenecks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project structure for high-friction areas that hinder development velocity.

steps.title: Automated Error Isolation
steps.description: Isolate the specific module causing the current development stall using AI-driven log analysis.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Identify the root cause of the current build failures in the authentication flow.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'find the failure in the auth service and propose a fix'

steps.title: Contextual Bug Remediation
steps.description: Apply targeted patches without introducing regressions, maintaining your momentum.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a refactor for the database connection pool that prevents the current race condition.
steps.claude_code_command: claude fix --file ./src/db.ts --issue 'race condition in connection pool'

steps.title: Dependency Conflict Resolution
steps.description: Resolve package versioning issues that often kill progress in complex stacks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit package.json for dependency conflicts that are preventing clean production builds.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'resolve dependency tree conflicts in package.json'

steps.title: Feature Velocity Acceleration
steps.description: Shift focus from debugging to building by automating the implementation of your backlog.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Outline the implementation steps for the stripe checkout integration based on current codebase context.

pro_tips: Always provide your 'PRD' (Product Requirements Document) as a context file to Claude Code to ensure fixes align with your business goals.
Use Antigravity to generate high-level architectural diagrams before letting Claude Code touch the logic to prevent 'spaghetti' patches.
Treat your logs as data; pipe them directly into your AI context window rather than manually pasting snippets.
Create a 'Definition of Done' prompt in Antigravity to force AI to write tests for every bug it patches.
Run periodic 'AI retrospectives' on your codebase to identify recurring patterns of technical debt that slow down your shipping cycle.
content.next_steps: Once your codebase is stable, implement a CI/CD pipeline that integrates Claude Code for automated 'pre-flight' checks on every pull request.
content.conversion_block: You are sitting on a goldmine of potential features, but they are trapped behind technical friction. Stop debugging manually and start shipping like a world-class engineering team. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
